titleEn: Puro H 3000: Pöttinger’s first maize planter
titleZh: Pöttinger推出首款玉米播种机Puro H 3000
summaryZh: 奥地利农机巨头Pöttinger首次进军播种机领域，推出Puro H 3000气动玉米播种机，工作宽度4.5米，播种速度达8.5公里/小时，可选配电驱实现分区控制和变量播种。首款为6行悬挂式机型，2026年底交付，后续将推出24行大型机。该产品虽非直接针对畜牧养殖，但作为饲料作物（玉米）播种的关键设备，对智慧畜牧产业链上游的种植环节具有参考价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了传统农机巨头向精准播种领域拓展的战略动向，其电驱选配、Isobus控制等技术对智慧畜牧产业链上游的饲料作物种植具有借鉴意义，值得关注饲料供应链智能化的从业者阅读。
contentFull: Puro H 3000: Pöttinger’s first maize planter 15-07 | Smart farming | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintMachinefabrikant Pöttinger komt met een compleet nieuwe machine, de Puro H 3000-maiszaaier. De pneumatische maiszaaimachine heeft een werkbreedte van 4,5 meter en zaait tot 8,5 km/uur. Foto: PöttingerAustrian machinery manufacturer Pöttinger is building a new pneumatic planter, the Puro H 3000. This is the first time Pöttinger has developed and marketed a planter for crops including maize and sugar beet.According to the manufacturer, the Puro H 3000 is a standard machine intended to compete with the most common machines offered by its competitors. For the first time, Pöttinger is developing a robust maize planter before launching a high-end machine.Electric drive optionalThe Puro H 3000 maize planter is suitable for sowing at forward speeds of up to 8.5 kilometres per hour, both on ploughed land and in fields with crop residues. Various discs are available, with disc pressure of up to 180 bar and double-disc coulters. The maize planter can optionally be equipped with electric drive. This also enables the use of section control and variable seed rates.The machine also has a fertiliser hopper with a capacity of 1,300 litres. Each sowing unit has a 68-litre seed hopper. The machine is controlled entirely via Isobus.First deliveries at the end of 2026The first model in the Puro series is a mounted 6-row machine with a working width of up to 4.5 metres and row spacing of up to 75 centimetres. The sowing units slide inwards for transport. According to Pöttinger, the first production models will be delivered at the end of 2026. Full series production will begin in 2027. No pricing information has yet been announced.Larger models from 2029Pöttinger is also working on larger versions within the Puro series. These are the Puro 5000 and 7000, which are expected to be available with up to 24 sowing units. These machines are not expected to be launched until 2029 and 2031 respectively.More variants of the Puro 3000 will also follow later. In 2027 and 2028, Pöttinger intends to introduce various rigid models with up to 12 rows.LinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint Lucas van de Weijer Future Farming robot expertMore aboutSmart FarmingadLEARN MORERelated articlesPremium23-04 | ArticlePioneering in the Dutch polder again with a robot22-04 | NewsKooiman supplies camera-guided hoeing machine Farming GT17-09-2025 | Photo reportHow precision farming pioneer Jacob van den Borne grows potatoes in 16 data-driven stepsPremium15-09-2025 | ArticleStudents develop fall-breaking system for broccoli Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
奥地利机械制造商Pöttinger正在制造一款新型气动播种机——Puro H 3000。这是Pöttinger首次开发并销售用于玉米和甜菜等作物的播种机。

据制造商称，Puro H 3000是一款标准机型，旨在与竞争对手提供的最常见机型竞争。Pöttinger首次在推出高端机型之前，先开发了一款坚固耐用的玉米播种机。

**可选电驱**

Puro H 3000玉米播种机适用于在犁耕地和有作物残留的田地上以最高8.5公里/小时的前进速度播种。提供多种圆盘，圆盘压力最高可达180巴，并采用双圆盘开沟器。该玉米播种机可选配电驱。这还使得能够使用分区控制和变量播种量。

该机还配有一个容量为1300升的肥料箱。每个播种单元有一个68升的种子箱。机器完全通过Isobus控制。

**首批交付于2026年底**

Puro系列的首款机型是一款悬挂式6行机，工作宽度可达4.5米，行距可达75厘米。播种单元在运输时向内滑动。据Pöttinger称，首批生产机型将于2026年底交付。全面系列化生产将于2027年开始。目前尚未公布定价信息。

**2029年起推出更大机型**

Pöttinger还在开发Puro系列中的更大版本。这些是Puro 5000和7000，预计将提供多达24个播种单元。这些机器预计要到2029年和2031年才能推出。

Puro 3000的更多变体也将随后推出。在2027年和2028年，Pöttinger计划推出多种刚性机型，最多可达12行。
author: Lucas van de Weijer
contentHtml: Pöttinger brengt met de Puro H 3000 zijn eerste pneumatische maiszaaimachine op de markt, geschikt voor standaardtoepassingen en elektrische aandrijving.
